title: 皐月賞の後に・忠犬大激走！

text_block_list.text:
It was a fierce bout with Meisho Doto running
desperately. But in the end, she finished
victorious.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Unbelievable! To think I would be outshone when
the stage was undoubtedly mine!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
You cunning assassin! You robber of crowns!
Prithee, what be thy name?!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: So that is what you go by? King Ah-um-ah!

Meisho Doto is clearly flustered by T.M. Opera
O's theatrics.

The littlest praise frazzles her brain. I might need
to watch my words...

Like last time, Meisho Doto is taken away by an
ambulance. Thankfully, there's no serious ailment
to speak of. These kinds of high-octane races
really do a number on her body.
